output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.email,
    SUM(o.total_cents) AS total_spent,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
    (CURRENT_DATE - c.created_at::date) AS days_since_signup
FROM 
    orders o
JOIN 
    customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    c.id, c.email, c.created_at
HAVING 
    COUNT(o.id) >= 2
ORDER BY 
    total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10;
```
